# Changelog

All notable changes to this project are documented here, following [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/) conventions and [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/).

**This file is generated, not hand-written**, from Conventional Commit messages (`CONTRIBUTING.md §4`) at each tagged release (`docs/BRANCHING.md §6`). Recommended tool: [`git-cliff`](https://git-cliff.org/) — config-driven, works directly off `feat:`/`fix:`/`BREAKING CHANGE:` commit trailers, and doesn't require a Node toolchain in an otherwise Go/Rust/Dart repo. Run it as part of the tagging step, commit the regenerated file in the same commit as the tag.

## [Unreleased]

Nothing tagged yet — first entry lands at `v0.1.0-M0`.
